id.description: Stable identifier for this portable OACS record.

kind.description: Evidence kind used for policy and projection decisions.

uri.description: External URI or locator for the referenced resource, provider, or protected value.

content_hash.description: Canonical content hash used for integrity checks across implementations.

sensitive.description: Whether the evidence has sensitive material stored outside public projection.

public_payload.description: Non-sensitive evidence payload that may be projected into context; secrets must stay external.
